title: Gamma Goo from Planet 9
description: Time is running out for the city under siege! It’s man against monster in a battle to save the city from this oozing enemy.
quote: I’ll stop that goo if it’s the last thing I do!
altHero: city skyline covered in pink good, helicopters circle in the sky
alt1: woman screams as pink goo floods in her door
alt2: woman and police officer run away from a pink ooze
alt3: spraying fire extinguishers at the goo
